title: Democrats Seize on Oil Topping $100 a Barrel, as Trump Downplays Jump
summary_full: The global oil benchmark topped $100 a barrel late Sunday, putting Republicans on the defensive on an issue at the center of this year’s midterm elections.
summary_public: The global oil benchmark topped $100 a barrel late Sunday, putting Republicans on the defensive on an issue at the center of this year’s midterm elections.
